svg.title: UrVoice system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Shows the full call flow from incoming phone call through Twilio, FastAPI backend, WebRTC VAD, ElevenLabs STT, Gemini LLM, ElevenLabs TTS, and back to the caller, with Firestore and Android app on the side.

g.text: Dashboard · Contacts · AI Voice clone setup · Call handling · OTP auth

svg.text: Total response time: ~1.1s avg · WebRTC VAD · audioop G.711 mulaw
